LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DIERDRE CHIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1; SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 TO PLEAD FACTS LINKING DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT TO THE ALLEGED INJURY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). MR. MCNEILL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
